default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Knapsack and GrowthX to discuss outbound campaign progress, content strategy, and website launch updates.](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Outbound campaign showing positive results with 15.94% positive reply rate; focus on improving open rates (currently 44%)](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [New website launch imminent; confirmed no URL changes to maintain SEO integrity](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
  - [Content strategy shifting to include Windows-focused articles and experimenting with backlink-oriented pieces on project management tools](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)

## Topics

### Outbound Campaign Performance

  - [Current campaign sending \~1,000 emails/day, capped due to domain limitations](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [15.94% positive reply rate from total replies (11 positive responses)](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [Open rate at 44%; aim to improve to 50%+ in next iterations](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
  - [Action: Duplicate campaign in Smart Lead to track open rates for B2B responses](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)

### Speed-to-Lead Optimization

  - [Identified as a key area for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [Plan to create generalized Loom video for faster follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [GrowthX team to handle initial video response to maintain quick turnaround](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)

### Website Launch & SEO

  - [New website launch planned for today/tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
  - [Confirmed no URL changes, maintaining current SEO standings](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [Sitemap expected to remain unchanged due to consistent URLs](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)

### Content Strategy Updates

  - [874 clicks achieved; "AI tends" page performing well](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
  - [Shifting focus to include Windows-oriented content for finance professionals](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Experimenting with 20-30 articles on project management tools for backlink potential](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [Planning to analyze AI note-taker competitors for comparison content](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Pierre to finalize and launch new prospect list, including podcast guests](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Mark to create generalized Loom video for follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Prateek to conduct detailed analysis of AI note-taker competitors](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)
  - [Team to experiment with 20-30 articles on project management tools](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)
  - [GrowthX team to implement new campaign in Smart Lead for tracking open rates](https://fathom.video/share/5JLQgqjAjsruTPghm2xPkFwMr3zHwzdz?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)

action_items.description: Duplicate SmartLead campaign to track open rates; ping Mark w/ link
Edit Clay automation to use new SmartLead campaign (for open rate tracking)
Ping Mark on Slack w/ initial emails for podcast guests to review
Create generalized Loom video for follow-up emails
Set up subsequence in SmartLead to send generalized Loom video
Confirm w/ web stacks team: URLs won't change w/ new website launch
Analyze AI notetaker competitors: domain authority, organic traffic, features
